hero.sub: Fullstack engineering focused on scalable systems, clean code and precise experiences — from a Go and Node back-end to React and Next.js on the front.
about.head: Driven by well-designed systems and the details that hold a product together.
about.p1: I am a fullstack developer focused on building web products end to end — modeling data, designing APIs in Go and Node, and shipping fast, accessible interfaces in React and Next.js. I pursue code that is predictable, observable and easy to maintain.
about.p2: I work with TypeScript end to end and value testing, performance and a developer experience that makes the next feature simpler than the last.
about.nowpost: , a B2B SaaS — from architecture to product.
proj.title: escuta...
proj.subtitle: Clinical Management System
proj.desc: A complete platform for clinical management. High-performance backend built in Go, relational database modeling and secure JWT authentication, with infrastructure split between Vercel and Render.
proj.soontxt: A modern web app with real-time cryptocurrency data integration powered by the CoinGecko API.
case.lead: Technical case study — from data modeling to production deploy, the engineering decisions behind a clinical management platform.
case.problem.head: Running a clinic without a purpose-built platform
case.problem.p1: Placeholder — describe the real operational scenario: scheduling scattered across spreadsheets, fragmented records, manual patient-flow control and no single source of truth for the clinical team.
case.problem.p2: Placeholder — explain why an off-the-shelf tool wasn't enough and what outcome the platform must guarantee: secure data centralization, fast responses under load and a reliable experience for staff and front desk.
case.arch.intro: A fullstack architecture designed for predictable performance and security, from the system boundary down to the data layer.
case.arch.go.title: High-performance backend in Go
case.arch.go.desc: Placeholder — detail the choice of Go: goroutine-based concurrency, low latency, static typing and a lean HTTP API powering the clinic's transactional core.
case.arch.db.title: Modeling & constraints in PostgreSQL
case.arch.db.desc: Placeholder — describe the relational model, foreign keys, indexes and constraints ensuring referential integrity and efficient queries over patients, schedules and appointments.
case.arch.jwt.title: Secure sessions with JWT
case.arch.jwt.desc: Placeholder — explain stateless authentication with JWT: token issuance and rotation, expiration, role-based authorization claims and protection of sensitive routes.
case.arch.infra.title: Split infra: Vercel + Render
case.arch.infra.desc: Placeholder — describe the deploy flow: React front-end on Vercel, Go service and database on Render, per-stage environment variables and continuous deploy from the repository.
case.chal.perf.title: Performance tuning
case.chal.perf.problem: Placeholder — bottlenecks observed under load (slow queries, N+1, contention).
case.chal.perf.solution: Placeholder — indexes, connection pooling, caching and query optimization applied.
case.chal.token.title: Token validation
case.chal.token.problem: Placeholder — risks of expiration, replay and revocation of JWT sessions.
case.chal.token.solution: Placeholder — verification middleware, secure refresh and per-route claim checks.
case.chal.sync.title: State synchronization
case.chal.sync.problem: Placeholder — divergence between React client state and the server.
case.chal.sync.solution: Placeholder — cache invalidation, optimistic updates and reconciliation with the backend.

process.s1.d: I understand the problem, map requirements and define scope, success metrics and constraints.
process.s2.d: I model the domain and design the schema and service architecture before writing code.
process.s3.d: I build a type-safe back-end and front-end with modular, predictable code.
process.s4.d: I cover critical flows with tests and automate build, lint and tests in the pipeline.
process.s5.d: I ship with continuous deployment and monitor logs, metrics and alerts in production.
